title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 337.340 - Fees — collection and deposit
text:
337.340.  Fees — collection and deposit. — All fees authorized under sections 337.300 to 337.345* shall be collected by the director of the division of professional registration and shall be transmitted to the department of revenue for deposit in the state treasury to the credit of the state committee of psychologists fund.
(L. 2010 H.B. 1311 & 1341) 
*Section 337.345 was repealed by H.B. 1563, 2012.
